data.body:
[New Year's Rhapsody No. 68 Celebration Gift]

Sensei, Schale prepared a celebration gift for the new event!
Please check your mailbox for your gift of Pyroxene x1,200!
(Available until 8/16/2022 14:59 PM.(UTC))
